executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: prefixed 4 Gherkin scenario titles in specs/031-live-stack-testing/scopes.md (Scopes 2/5/6) with their SCN-LST-NNN trace IDs (SCN-LST-001 All migrations apply cleanly, SCN-LST-002 Schema DDL resilience, SCN-LST-003 Full pipeline flow, SCN-LST-004 Search works after cold start) and prefixed one corresponding DoD bullet per scenario with `Scenario SCN-LST-NNN (<title>):`. No production code, no other parent artifacts, and no scenario-manifest entries modified.

Artifact-only fix: regression test is the traceability-guard run itself (see validate phase). Underlying behavior tests (tests/integration/db_migration_test.go, tests/integration/ml_readiness_test.go, tests/e2e/capture_process_search_test.go) are unchanged and remain part of the parent feature's already-passing test suite.

Bug folder artifacts (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json) populated with full content. No external doc syncing required (artifact-only fix; no API surface, runtime behavior, or operator workflow changed).

Traceability-guard PASS: `bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/031-live-stack-testing` returns RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings) with 12/12 scenario-to-row mappings, 12/12 Gherkin scenarios mapped to DoD, 12 concrete test file references, and 12 report evidence references. Pre-fix baseline was RESULT: FAILED (7 failures, 0 warnings) with 3 unmapped scenarios on the row check and 3 unmapped scenarios on the G068 DoD check. Output recorded inline in report.md > Validation Evidence.

Artifact lint PASS for both parent (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/031-live-stack-testing`) and bug folder (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/031-live-stack-testing/bugs/BUG-031-002-dod-scenario-fidelity-gap`). git diff --name-only confirms boundary: zero changes under internal/, cmd/, ml/, config/, tests/, or any other parent spec artifact. All edits confined to specs/031-live-stack-testing/scopes.md and the new bug folder.

Chaos N/A for artifact-only documentation/traceability fix: no runtime code path, no concurrency, no failure injection surface affected. Recorded for ceiling compliance per workflow specReview enforcement.
